data.summary: [3/12 (Tue) Ban Notice] We have taken disciplinary actions against the players who were abusing in-g
data.body:
[3/12 (Tue) Ban Notice]

We have taken disciplinary actions against the players who were abusing in-game system in Total Assault.

▶ Total number of players banned: 11
▶ Period: Permanent
▶ More details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3220&thread=2523015

#BlueArchive
